access.guest_fallback_message: Detailed explanations are available for logged-in Saola students only.

q33.explanation: Câu 33 khớp với thông tin ở đoạn A. Ý chính trong bài là: "Commercial deer farming in Australia commenced in Victoria in 1971 with the authorised capture of rusa deer from the Royal National Park, NSW. Until 1985, only four species of deer, two from temperate climates (red, fallow) and two tropical species (rusa, chital) were confined for commercial farming. Late in 2005, pressure from industry to increase herd numbers saw the development of import protocols.". Vì câu hỏi diễn đạt lại cùng một ý, đáp án là TRUE.
q33.evidence: Commercial deer farming in Australia commenced in Victoria in 1971 with the authorised capture of rusa deer from the Royal National Park, NSW. Until 1985, only four species of deer, two from temperate climates (red, fallow) and two tropical species (rusa, chital) were confined for commercial farming. Late in 2005, pressure from industry to increase herd numbers saw the development of import protocols._

q34.explanation: Câu 34 có một số từ khóa gần với đoạn A, nhưng bài không cung cấp đủ chi tiết để xác nhận hay phủ định toàn bộ mệnh đề. Câu gần nhất là: "Commercial deer farming in Australia commenced in Victoria in 1971 with the authorised capture of rusa deer from the Royal National Park, NSW. Until 1985, only four species of deer, two from temperate climates (red, fallow) and two tropical species (rusa, chital) were confined for commercial farming. Late in 2005, pressure from industry to increase herd numbers saw the development of import protocols.". Vì thiếu thông tin trực tiếp, đáp án là NOT GIVEN.
q34.evidence: Commercial deer farming in Australia commenced in Victoria in 1971 with the authorised capture of rusa deer from the Royal National Park, NSW. Until 1985, only four species of deer, two from temperate climates (red, fallow) and two tropical species (rusa, chital) were confined for commercial farming. Late in 2005, pressure from industry to increase herd numbers saw the development of import protocols._

q35.explanation: Câu 35 mâu thuẫn với thông tin ở đoạn B. Bài nêu: "The number of animals processed annually has continued to increase, despite the downward trend in venison prices since 2007. Of concern is the apparent increase in the number of female animals processed and the number of whole herds committed for processing. With more than 40,000 animals processed in 2011/12 and 60,000 in 2012/13, there is justified concern that future years may see a dramatic drop in production.". Câu hỏi đã đổi một chi tiết quan trọng hoặc đảo ngược ý trong bài, nên đáp án là FALSE.
q35.evidence: The number of animals processed annually has continued to increase, despite the downward trend in venison prices since 2007. Of concern is the apparent increase in the number of female animals processed and the number of whole herds committed for processing. With more than 40,000 animals processed in 2011/12 and 60,000 in 2012/13, there is justified concern that future years may see a dramatic drop in production._

q36.explanation: Câu 36 có một số từ khóa gần với đoạn B, nhưng bài không cung cấp đủ chi tiết để xác nhận hay phủ định toàn bộ mệnh đề. Câu gần nhất là: "At least 85 per cent of all venison produced in Australia is exported, principally to Europe, with the remainder being consumed domestically. At least 90 per cent of all velvet antler produced is exported in an unprocessed state to Asia. Schemes to promote Australian deer products continue to have a positive effect on sales that, in turn, have a positive effect on prices paid to breeders.". Vì thiếu thông tin trực tiếp, đáp án là NOT GIVEN.
q36.evidence: At least 85 per cent of all venison produced in Australia is exported, principally to Europe, with the remainder being consumed domestically. At least 90 per cent of all velvet antler produced is exported in an unprocessed state to Asia. Schemes to promote Australian deer products continue to have a positive effect on sales that, in turn, have a positive effect on prices paid to breeders._

q37.explanation: Câu 37 có một số từ khóa gần với đoạn B, nhưng bài không cung cấp đủ chi tiết để xác nhận hay phủ định toàn bộ mệnh đề. Câu gần nhất là: "Schemes to promote Australian deer products continue to have a positive effect on sales that, in turn, have a positive effect on prices paid to breeders. The industry appears to be showing limited signs that it is emerging from a state of depression caused by both internal and external factors that include: (i) the Asian currency downturn; (ii) the industry’s lack of competitive advantage in influential markets (particularly with respect to New Zealand competition); and (iii) within industry processing and marketing competition for limited product volumes of venison.". Vì thiếu thông tin trực tiếp, đáp án là NOT GIVEN.
q37.evidence: Schemes to promote Australian deer products continue to have a positive effect on sales that, in turn, have a positive effect on prices paid to breeders. The industry appears to be showing limited signs that it is emerging from a state of depression caused by both internal and external factors that include: (i) the Asian currency downturn; (ii) the industry’s lack of competitive advantage in influential markets (particularly with respect to New Zealand competition); and (iii) within industry processing and marketing competition for limited product volumes of venison._
